title: ranunculus aconitifolius var. humilis
intro: Ranunculus aconitifolius var. humilis, also known as small-flowered buttercup or dwarf ranunculus, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ranunculus aconitifolius var. humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional Japanese herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal preparations.
